## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests.
- [ ] I updated documentation or examples when public behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not commit generated files unless they are documented fixtures.
- [ ] I checked formatting/linting where applicable.
- [ ] I noted any optional backend requirements.
